← Home

I build things,
then write about them.

Full Stack AI Developer based in Kolkata. I spend most of my time writing Python, TypeScript, and SQL — and thinking about markets, systems, and how things actually work underneath the surface.

This blog is where I put everything that doesn't fit anywhere else — project write-ups, technical notes, things I found interesting, and the occasional thought I couldn't stop thinking about.

you'll find
project notes · technical write-ups · things I like · misc thoughts
